title: King's Rhapsody
writer: Ivor Novello, Pamela Bower, Christopher Hassall
actors: Anna Neagle, Errol Flynn, Patrice Wymore
plot: Richard, son of the King of Laurentia, who has been living in Monte Carlo with Martha Karrillos for several years because his parents refused to accept this unroyal affair, is called to assume his duties after his father's death. ...
